commands.name: scan

options.name: --deprecated
options.description:
Check deprecated packagess. true to include, false to
exclude.

options.name: --severity
options.description:
Severity levels to scan for. Matches will return non-zero
exit codes. Multiple levels can be specified.

options.name: --trace
options.description: Show detailed working and Nuget results.

options.name: --transitive
options.description:
Toggle transitive package checks. true to include them,
false to exclude.

options.name: --vulnerable
options.description:
Toggle vulnerable package checks. true to include them,
false to exclude.

arguments.name: solution-project
arguments.description: The solution or project file to check.
